prompt: Hyper-realistic fashion week portrait. An elegant adult East Asian woman walks toward the camera through an outdoor fashion show or high-end venue. Shot from head to mid-thigh; face in the upper-middle frame. Walking diagonally forward—one hip naturally shifting with the gait, right shoulder slightly forward, right arm hanging down, right hand relaxed near the bottom right corner. Slight sense of motion. Slender and dignified figure, warm light-to-medium skin tone, defined cheekbones, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, soft arched eyebrows, straight delicate nose, neutral rose-beige lip color. An expression that is dignified, confident, and quietly focused—gaze slightly past the camera to the left. Lips lightly closed, facial muscles relaxed. Exquisite, restrained makeup: glowing natural skin, light warm blush, subtle brown contouring, fine brown-grey eyeliner, neutral eyeshadow, satin nude lip color. Real pores, fine texture, small natural beauty marks, under-eye details, highlights on forehead/nose/cheekbones/collarbones. No over-editing. Hairstyle: A neat and low-key low bun, slightly off-center front part, smooth hair swept behind ears. Very fine loose strands at temples, ears, and nape of neck catching warm side light. Modern, minimalist, editorial look. Outfit—Three-piece taupe-grey color scheme: A fitted ribbed stone-grey tank top—wide round neckline, thin straps, fine vertical ribbing, slight torso tension, soft horizontal wrinkles at the waist. Ends near the waistband of the trousers, with only a very narrow sliver of skin showing on one side. A large, lightweight coat in a slightly warm grey-beige—wide lapels, lightly structured shoulders, long open front, sleeves pushed up to about three-quarter length. Thin washed linen, silk-linen, or micro-crinkled suit fabric: real wrinkles, fine weave, subtle sheen. One side of the coat swings out behind the right hand—suggesting forward motion and a breeze. High-waisted wide-leg trousers in a light mushroom brown-grey—wide waistband, belt loops, front pleats, flowing drape at the hips. Accurate tailoring, shallow pleats, soft diagonal tension lines, delicate fabric color variations. Trousers extend beyond the lower edge of the frame. Jewelry: Only tiny, low-key stud earrings. No necklaces, bracelets, handbags, sunglasses, or logos. Right hand: Long, relaxed fingers, natural joints, short nude glossy nails, gentle movement at fingertips. Scene: Sophisticated outdoor event space under a canopy or temporary structure. Foreground background: White tent wall, light-colored structural panels, vertical grey support column to the left of the head, large matte black rectangular speaker at the top right. Fashion week atmosphere, no readable brand identifiers. Middle and left background: Formally dressed audience and photographers—dark suits, black coats, and understated clothing, standing behind low metal barriers. All background figures anonymous and heavily blurred—blurred faces, dark silhouettes, raised hands, blurred camera equipment. Dark textured crowd background emphasizes light clothing and glowing skin. Lighting: Warm afternoon sun from slightly above the left front—golden highlights on the left forehead, cheek, nose, neck, collarbone, upper chest, coat lapel, and forearm. Soft, detailed shadows on the opposite side. Restrained rim light along the hairline, ears, shoulders, and swinging edges of the coat. Natural directional warmth; no orange tints. Tones: Mushroom grey, warm tan, stone beige, charcoal, black, cream white, soft skin tones. Honey-gold sunlight highlights on skin and fabric. Medium contrast, rich open shadows, smooth highlight transitions, natural saturation. Camera: Chest height, full frame 85mm, f/2–f/2.8. Shutter speed fast enough to freeze face and upper body while maintaining slight movement in the coat. Eyes/face/ribbed top/lapels/forearms sharp and clear; crowd/barriers/tents/equipment dissolved into soft bokeh. Fashion week snapshot: minimal luxury, effortless tailoring, confident motion, analog film grain, gentle lens softening, magazine quality. Negative: No text, no logos, no watermarks, no brand names, no sharp-focused extra people, no deformed hands, no extra fingers, no duplicate limbs, no deformed clothing, no exaggerated proportions, no plastic skin, no harsh flash, no artificial HDR, no oversaturated colors, no messy elements obstructing the person.

promptZh: 超写实时装周肖像。一位优雅的成年东亚女性正走向镜头，背景为户外时装秀或高端场地。拍摄范围从头部到大腿中部；面部位于画面中上方。身体斜向前方行走——臀部随步伐自然摆动，右肩略微前倾，右臂自然下垂，右手放松地靠近右下角。带有轻微的动感。身材修长端庄，肤色为暖色调至中等色调，颧骨轮廓分明，杏仁状深棕色双眼，眉毛呈柔和的拱形，鼻梁挺拔精致，唇色为中性玫瑰米色。表情为 端庄、自信且专注——目光略微越过镜头看向左侧。双唇微闭，面部肌肉放松。精致且克制的妆容：透出自然光泽的肌肤，淡淡的暖色腮红，细腻的棕色修容，精致的棕灰色眼线，中性色眼影，缎面裸色唇膏。呈现真实的毛孔、细腻的纹理、天然小痣、眼下细节，以及额头、鼻梁、颧骨和锁骨上的高光。无过度修图。发型：整洁低调的低发髻，前额发际线略微偏分，柔顺的头发梳至耳后。鬓角、耳边和颈后的细碎发丝在暖侧光下清晰可见。现代、极简、杂志大片风格。服装——三件套灰褐色系：修身罗纹石灰色背心——宽圆领，细肩带，细腻的竖向罗纹，躯干处略带紧绷感，腰部有柔和的横向褶皱。背心下摆位于裤腰附近，仅露出一小片侧腰肌肤。一件轻盈的灰米色大衣——宽翻领，肩部线条自然，前襟敞开，袖子推至约七分袖长度。材质为轻薄水洗亚麻、丝麻或微皱西装面料：呈现真实的褶皱、细腻的织纹和微妙的光泽。大衣的一侧随右手摆动向后飘起——暗示着向前的动感和微风。高腰阔腿裤，呈浅蘑菇棕灰色——宽腰头，带腰带环，前褶设计，臀部垂坠感极佳。剪裁精准，褶皱柔和，带有细腻的斜向张力线，面料色彩过渡自然。裤脚延伸至画面下方之外。配饰：仅佩戴极小的低调耳钉。无项链、手链、手提包、墨镜或 Logo。右手：手指修长放松，关节自然，短款裸色亮面指甲，指尖动作轻柔。场景：位于遮阳棚或临时结构下的精致户外活动空间。前景与背景：白色帐篷墙面，浅色结构板，头部左侧有一根垂直的灰色支撑柱，右上角有一个大型哑光黑色长方形扬声器。时装周氛围，无可见的品牌标识。中景和左侧背景：身着正装的观众和摄影师——穿着深色西装、黑色大衣等低调服装，站在低矮的金属护栏后。所有背景人物均匿名且高度模糊——面部模糊、深色剪影、举起的手、模糊的摄影器材。深色纹理的背景人群凸显了浅色服装和透亮的肤色。光线：左前方略高处的午后暖阳——左额头、脸颊、鼻梁、颈部、锁骨、上胸部、大衣翻领和前臂上呈现金色高光。对侧有柔和且富有细节的阴影。发际线、耳朵、肩膀和大衣摆动边缘有克制的轮廓光。自然的定向暖光；无橙色色调。色调：蘑菇灰、暖棕褐色、石米色、炭黑、黑色、奶油白，以及柔和的肤色。皮肤和织物上带有蜂蜜金色的阳光高光。中等对比度，丰富的暗部细节，平滑的高光过渡，自然的饱和度。相机：胸部高度，全画幅 85mm 镜头，f/2–f/2.8 光圈。快门速度足以定格面部和上半身，同时保持大衣的轻微动感。眼睛、面部、罗纹背心、翻领和前臂清晰锐利；人群、护栏、帐篷和设备溶解在柔和的焦外成像中。时装周抓拍：极简奢华，随性剪裁，自信动态，模拟胶片颗粒感，柔和的镜头虚化，杂志级画质。负面提示词：无文字，无 Logo，无水印，无品牌名称，无焦点清晰的额外人物，无畸形手部，无多余手指，无重复肢体，无变形服装，无夸张比例，无塑料感皮肤，无强闪光，无人工 HDR，无过饱和色彩，无遮挡人物的杂乱元素。
